encounter.reason: Scheduled 8-week follow-up ultrasound in third pregnancy; resulted in diagnosis of missed abortion and subsequent D&C
encounter.location: Rocky Mountain Women's Health, Denver, CO

labs.name: karyotype analysis of products of conception

conditions.name: missed abortion
conditions.description: Missed abortion at 8 weeks gestation — embryonic demise with fetal pole growth arrest at approximately 7 weeks 1 day, absent cardiac activity on transvaginal ultrasound

conditions.name: recurrent pregnancy loss
conditions.description: Three consecutive first-trimester losses, including one with confirmed euploid conceptus (46,XX). Prior RPL workup unrevealing.

medications.name: micronized progesterone 200 mg vaginal capsule
medications.sig: Insert 200 mg vaginally at bedtime nightly
medications.reason: Progesterone supplementation for pregnancy support; discontinued following diagnosis of missed abortion

procedures.name: dilation and curettage of uterus
procedures.reason: Missed abortion at 8 weeks — to expedite physical recovery and obtain products of conception for cytogenetic analysis
procedures.outcome: Uncomplicated. Products of conception obtained and sent for histopathology and cytogenetic karyotype analysis.
procedures.location: Rocky Mountain Women's Health affiliated ambulatory surgery center

document_references.description: Documents scheduled 8-week follow-up ultrasound, vitals, transvaginal ultrasound findings showing absent cardiac activity and growth arrest, diagnosis of missed abortion (third consecutive first-trimester loss), counseling and decision for D&C. Includes addenda for D&C performed 03/12/2025 (uncomplicated), histopathology results, cytogenetic results (46,XX normal female karyotype — pivotal euploid finding), and follow-up beta-hCG confirming resolution. Notes clinical suspicion for antiphospholipid syndrome and plan for APS antibody panel.

diagnostic_reports.description: Intrauterine gestational sac present. Fetal pole measuring 7 weeks 1 day with no interval growth from expected 8-week trajectory. Absent cardiac activity. Findings consistent with missed abortion; embryonic demise estimated to have occurred 1–2 weeks prior.

diagnostic_reports.type: Histopathology examination of products of conception
diagnostic_reports.description: Confirmed products of conception with chorionic villi identified. No molar changes. Specimen obtained via D&C performed 2025-03-12.

diagnostic_reports.type: Cytogenetic karyotype analysis of products of conception
observation_names: karyotype analysis of products of conception
diagnostic_reports.description: Normal female karyotype (46,XX). Pivotal finding eliminating embryonic aneuploidy as the cause of this loss, shifting clinical suspicion toward a maternal factor.
